spec_match.rationale: Uses standard SpeechRecognition dictation and now requests local processing with processLocally=true while surfacing local pack status via SpeechRecognition.available() when exposed.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive, featuring real-time dictation committed to a contenteditable-style block, word count trackers, custom paragraphing, and scrollable status log feeds.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent blurb perfectly, showing a robust dictation text editor with detailed session statistics.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles speech capture restarts in continuous mode gracefully and updates the status indicators on aborted/errored outcomes.

references.rationale: The see also block now includes the required ChromeStatus feature link 6090916291674112.

design_system.rationale: Aligns perfectly with the showcase styling patterns, applying correct margins, button borders, and AA contrast.

openQuestions.title: Re-review repaired live probe in chrome-devtools-mcp
openQuestions.detail: The live probe or copyable feature-detection snippet was repaired on 2026-06-04. Re-run this route in chrome-devtools-mcp, exercise the visible controls, and verify the repaired probe output plus console/network state before marking the critique fully current.

summary: 2026-06-04 maintenance replaced inaccurate live-probe logic with feature-specific checks; chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable in this session, so browser click-through re-review is still required.
